text: Email to Epstein confirms Jean-Luc Brunel present in the Oval Office on September 27, 2013.
Epstein directs Fabrizio Cerina (Credit des Alpes banker) to 230 E 71st Street for brunch meeting in June 2011.
FBI tip: inmate at Clinton Correctional Facility claims to possess information about Epstein death.
Ghislaine Maxwell sightings in Manchester, NH — local police observed her around town during investigation.
Boris Nikolic flies to Epstein NM ranch Aug 18; they fly together to NYC Aug 19 to meet Bill
